allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('products:', len\(d['products']\), '| categories:', len\(d['categories']\), '| total:', d['total'], '| page:', d['page']\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('products:', len\(d['products']\), '| categories:', len\(d['categories']\), '| total:', d['total']\); print\('cats:', [c['name'] for c in d['categories']]\); print\('prods:', [p['name'] for p in d['products'][:3]]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('products:', len\(d['products']\), '| categories:', len\(d['categories']\)\); print\('cats:', [c['name'] for c in d['categories']]\)")
